title: Contribute to association governance
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Contribute to association governance demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Monitor association activities

pcs.text: Monitor activities undertaken by group to ensure association objectives and constitution are being adhered to and resolutions of meetings are being followed
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor activities undertaken by group to ensure association objectives and constitution are being adhered to and resolutions of meetings are being followed?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor activities undertaken by group to ensure association objectives and constitution are being adhered to and resolutions of meetings are being followed.

pcs.text: Note variations from expected standards and take immediate routine action
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Note variations from expected standards and take immediate routine action?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Note variations from expected standards and take immediate routine action.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Monitor association activities

elements.title: Identify opportunities, threats and risks

pcs.text: Identify opportunities for the group to contribute to group objectives
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify opportunities for the group to contribute to group objectives?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify opportunities for the group to contribute to group objectives.

pcs.text: Conduct a Strengths, Weaknesses, Opportunities and Threats (SWOT) analysis
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct a Strengths, Weaknesses, Opportunities and Threats (SWOT) analysis?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct a Strengths, Weaknesses, Opportunities and Threats (SWOT) analysis.

pcs.text: Identify threats and risks to group activities and ongoing operation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify threats and risks to group activities and ongoing operation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify threats and risks to group activities and ongoing operation.

pcs.text: Submit the SWOT analysis and make recommendations to the committee
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Submit the SWOT analysis and make recommendations to the committee?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Submit the SWOT analysis and make recommendations to the committee.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Identify opportunities, threats and risks

elements.title: Participate in board or committee meeting

pcs.text: Review agendas and meeting papers before meetings
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Review agendas and meeting papers before meetings?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review agendas and meeting papers before meetings.

pcs.text: Submit agenda items and reports as required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Submit agenda items and reports as required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Submit agenda items and reports as required.

pcs.text: Attend meetings and discuss issues on the agenda
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Attend meetings and discuss issues on the agenda?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Attend meetings and discuss issues on the agenda.

pcs.text: Establish and maintain communications with other members to ensure competent management of group affairs
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Establish and maintain communications with other members to ensure competent management of group affairs?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Establish and maintain communications with other members to ensure competent management of group affairs.

pcs.text: Take actions and report on commitments made at meeting
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Take actions and report on commitments made at meeting?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Take actions and report on commitments made at meeting.
